# StencilMaker

> StencilMaker is the AI tool engineered specifically for professional
> tattoo artists. It converts client reference photos into vector-grade
> tattoo stencils — clean linework optimized for thermal-transfer paper —
> eliminating roughly an hour of iPad tracing per client.

## What StencilMaker does

- Generates tattoo stencils from any reference image (photo, sketch, or AI art).
- Strips background, lighting artifacts, and noise; outputs pure linework.
- Supports 10 distinct AI style engines (Sacred Geometry, Japanese, Fine Line, Hyper-Realism, Traditional, Neo-Traditional, Blackwork, Dotwork, Linework, Tribal).
- Exports PNG (free), and PNG + PDF + SVG (Pro/Master).
- Master tier prints directly to Bluetooth or USB thermal stencil printers.

## Who it is for

Professional tattoo artists, apprentices, and studios. Independent artists working from iPad, Android, or desktop browsers.

## Platforms

iOS (App Store), Android (Google Play), Web app. One account syncs across all three.

## Pricing (USD / month)

- Apprentice — $0. 3 generations per day, 3 styles, PNG-only.
- Pro — $20. Higher daily limits, all 10 styles, PNG/PDF/SVG, enhanced background removal. 14-day free trial.
- Master — $30. Everything in Pro plus thermal printer support, cloud sync + offline, 5 concurrent requests, highest quality. 14-day free trial.

## Key differentiators

- Diffusion Model 4.0 trained specifically on stencil-grade linework — not a generic photo-to-line filter.
- Output quality holds up under thermal transfer (heat-resistant, no broken contours).
- Vector-grade output (SVG) preserves precision at any scale.
- Built by and for working tattoo artists, not hobbyists.
